text:
Once upon a merry little time?
Four happy rabbits.

What rabbit wouldn't want friends?
Their ears?

They could listen!
A lot.

Once they listened to a lot of stuff.

Every time they listened,
They learned something.

Every time you listen,
Everything seems interesting.

What rabbit don't listen?

You tell.

Five brown rabbits
Three wise?

* They listened.
